lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਸੁ ਕਮੀਰੁ ਚੜੑਿਓ ਗੜੑ ਊਪਰਿ ਰਾਜੁ ਲੀਓ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ॥੬॥੯॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: daas kameer charraio garra aoopar raaj leeo abinaasee |6|9|17|
lines.english: Slave Kabeer has climbed to the top of the fortress; I have obtained the eternal, imperishable domain. ||6||9||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਵਤ ਭੀਰਿ ਸਕਤਿ ਸਿਮਰਨ ਕੀ ਕਟੀ ਕਾਲ ਭੈ ਫਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: bhagavat bheer sakat simaran kee kattee kaal bhai faasee |
lines.english: With the army of God's devotees, and Shakti, the power of meditation, I have snapped the noose of the fear of death.
Tied up in chains, they took Kabeer there. ||1||
The mother Ganges is deep and profound.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਚਿਤੁ ਰਹਿਓ ਸਮਾਇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal chit rahio samaae | rahaau |
lines.english: My consciousness remained immersed in the Lotus Feet of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਨ ਡਿਗੈ ਤਨੁ ਕਾਹੇ ਕਉ ਡਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man na ddigai tan kaahe kau ddaraae |
lines.english: My mind was not shaken; why should my body be afraid?
and Kabeer was seated on a deer skin. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੰਗਾ ਕੀ ਲਹਰਿ ਮੇਰੀ ਟੁਟੀ ਜੰਜੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: gangaa kee lehar meree ttuttee janjeer |
lines.english: The waves of the Ganges broke the chains,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿ ਕੰਬੀਰ ਕੋਊ ਸੰਗ ਨ ਸਾਥ ॥
lines.translit: keh kanbeer koaoo sang na saath |
lines.english: Says Kabeer, I have no friend or companion.
On the water, and on the land, the Lord is my Protector. ||3||10||18||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Bhairao, Kabeer Jee, Ashtpadheeyaa, Second House:
where the Eternally Young Lord God abides. ||1||
There, His Divine Light radiates forth.
God constructed a fortress, inaccessible and unreachable, in which He dwells.
Lightning blazes, and bliss prevails there,

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਜੀਉ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: eihu jeeo raam naam liv laagai |
lines.english: This soul is lovingly attuned to the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਰਾ ਮਰਨੁ ਛੂਟੈ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਭਾਗੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaraa maran chhoottai bhram bhaagai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: It is saved from old age and death, and its doubt runs away. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬਰਨ ਬਰਨ ਸਿਉ ਮਨ ਹੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: abaran baran siau man hee preet |
lines.english: Those who believe in high and low social classes,
The Unstruck Sound-current of the Shabad, the Word of God, resounds in that place,
only sing songs and chants of egotism.
He creates planets, solar systems and galaxies;
where the Supreme Lord God abides. ||2||
He destroys the three worlds, the three gods and the three qualities.
The Inaccessible and Unfathomable Lord God dwells in the heart.
The Lord shines forth in the plantain flower and the sunshine.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰੁ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ਕੋ ਧਰਨੀਧਰ ਮੰਤ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: paar na paavai ko dharaneedhar mant |3|
lines.english: No one can find the limits or the secrets of the Lord of the World. ||3||
He dwells in the pollen of the lotus flower.
The Supreme Lord, the Lord of Lakshmi dwells there. ||4||
The Lord's secret is within the twelve petals of the heart-lotus.
but the Primal Immaculate Lord celebrates there. ||5||
In the profoundly silent celestial realm, He radiates forth.
He is like the sky, stretching across the lower, upper and middle realms.
Neither the sun nor the moon are there,
Take your cleansing bath in the Mansarovar Lake.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਹੰ ਸੋ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਹੈ ਜਾਪ ॥
lines.translit: sohan so jaa kau hai jaap |
lines.english: Chant "Sohang" - "He is me."
Know that He is in the universe, and in the body as well.
He is not affected by either high or low social class, sunshine or shade.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਰ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: avar na paaeeai gur kee saam |
lines.english: He is in the Guru's Sanctuary, and nowhere else.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਲਿਪਤ ਨ ਹੋਇ ਪੁੰਨ ਅਰੁ ਪਾਪ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jaa kau lipat na hoe pun ar paap |6|
lines.english: He is not affected by either virtue or vice. ||6||
One who knows the Lord in the mind

lines.gurmukhi: ਟਾਰੀ ਨ ਟਰੈ ਆਵੈ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: ttaaree na ttarai aavai na jaae |
lines.english: He is not diverted by diversions, comings or goings.
Remain intuitively absorbed in the celestial void. ||7||
Millions of suns shine for Him,
One who firmly implants the Lord's Divine Light, and His Mantra within the mind
- says Kabeer, such a mortal crosses over to the other side. ||8||1||
whatever he says, comes to pass.
Millions of Brahmas chant the Vedas for Him. ||1||
millions of Shivas and Kailash mountains.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਗਾ ਕੋਟਿ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਮਰਦਨੁ ਕਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: duragaa kott jaa kai maradan karai |
lines.english: Millions of Durga goddesses massage His Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨ ਦੇਵ ਸਿਉ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਾਮ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aan dev siau naahee kaam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I have nothing to do with any other deities. ||1||Pause||
Millions of moons twinkle in the sky.
When I beg, I beg only from the Lord.
